examples: I bet you dyed your hair only because you're jealous of my luscious hair!
It was a clear little stream which ran quite merrily along on its narrow way through the luscious damp greenness.
The dancers bathed in luscious strains.
For one, it is an excellent way to savour sea-bound, lake-dappled Seattle and its luscious parks.
Resnais makes luscious use of interiors, and the camera glides sensuously through the most commonplace scenes.
